name: @forwardimpact/svctrace
description: OpenTelemetry span ingestion and storage over gRPC — prove whether agent changes improved outcomes.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Finishing an agent improvement and realizing there is no centralized place to store and compare trace spans.
jobs.bigHire: collect trace spans from any product without each one managing its own storage.
jobs.littleHire: send spans from a product and trust they are queryable later.
jobs.competesWith: per-product trace files; manual log comparison; skipping observability entirely
